overlap_notes: Standalone peripheral-blood microarray row. GEO lists 11 human peripheral blood samples from Crohn disease and ulcerative colitis patients on GPL570, with citation missing and no linked publication/PMID. No public evidence found for overlap with another current registry row, so count as an independent small cohort, but keep manual review for weak publication/provenance metadata.

Primary UC single-cell immune landscape row. GEO title and PMID 32826341 support an integrated scRNA-seq/scTCR-seq/scBCR-seq resource from 15 patients across rectum, ileum, and PBMC immune cells. No public evidence found for subject/sample overlap with another current primary row; count as independent. Row publication title should be corrected separately because current title appears to describe an unrelated colorectal-cancer study.

Mount Sinai Hospital IBD surgical bowel RNA-seq family. GEO GSE83687 is part of PMID 28892060 but is the MSH Population Specimen Collection and Profiling cohort: surgical bowel specimens from 134 IBD and non-IBD-control patients. This is not CERTIFI/DS102 and no public evidence indicates sample overlap with DS102 or other current rows; count as independent.

Standalone small Crohn colon RNA-seq/splicing row. GEO lists colon tissue from 4 Crohn disease and 4 control individuals, with SRA SRP301816 and BioProject PRJNA692234; citation is missing and no PMID/DOI was confirmed. No public evidence found for overlap with another current registry row, so count as independent, but keep manual review for missing publication/provenance metadata.
